task.title: Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence
task.summary: Strengthen validation gateway profiles so required audits, graph context, fresh isolation, and content proof are enforced by build kind and change class.

goal.outcome: Gateways block when required audit evidence, graph context, fresh isolation, or content-proof refs are missing for sensitive boundaries.
acceptance: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
non_goals: Do not implement remote push/release automation.
Do not replace deterministic tests with non-deterministic validation.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Gateways distinguish pre-commit implementation/task-close content proof from publication immutable proof.
Implementation validation can pass with fresh validator, clean=false, and working_tree_digest.
Publication validation requires clean=true and immutable commit/tree/package/archive/remote proof.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Dirty TASK-078-style implementation validation can pass under updated policy.
evidence_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs and tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs assert `clean=false` plus `working_tree_digest` produces implementation pass.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Publication cannot pass with dirty working-tree digest alone.
evidence_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs and tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs assert publication blocks dirty digest and requires immutable proof.

summary: TASK-080/TASK-084 gateway content-proof policy now supports dirty pre-commit working-tree digest for implementation validation while keeping publication boundaries clean and immutable.

evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs directly covers application gateway policy for missing evidence, dirty pre-commit implementation pass, dirty publication block, and clean publication pass.
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs covers tool-facing schema and validation writer behavior through registered `codewiki_validation`.
tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs remains regression coverage for content-proof refs and validation attestations.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/builds.ts implements profile-specific content-proof policy and validation report blocking behavior.
src/application/claims.ts, src/domain/shared/types.ts, and src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts carry new proof fields.
src/application/graph.ts recognizes implementation/task-close working-tree proof vs publication immutable proof.
System docs updated in alignment-model, graph, builds, and validation-gateway.
notes: This directly addresses TASK-078 validation block: dirty implementation validation no longer requires `clean=true` if a fresh validator records working-tree digest content proof.
Publication remains stricter; working-tree digest is not enough for push/release/package gates.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs directly covers application gateway policy for missing evidence, dirty pre-commit implementation pass, dirty publication block, and clean publication pass.
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs covers tool-facing schema and validation writer behavior through registered `codewiki_validation`.
tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs remains regression coverage for content-proof refs and validation attestations.
code_change_evidence: src/application/builds.ts implements profile-specific content-proof policy and validation report blocking behavior.
src/application/claims.ts, src/domain/shared/types.ts, and src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts carry new proof fields.
src/application/graph.ts recognizes implementation/task-close working-tree proof vs publication immutable proof.
System docs updated in alignment-model, graph, builds, and validation-gateway.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation profiles declare required content-proof evidence by implementation/task-close vs publication contexts.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `validationIsolationRequirement` now distinguishes `fresh-context-checked-content` for implementation/task-close from `fresh-context-clean-immutable-content` for publication/publish/release.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation validation can pass in dirty pre-commit worktree when fresh validator records deterministic working-tree digest.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `writeValidationReport` accepts `clean=false` plus `working_tree_digest`/`worktree_digest` for implementation/task-close; tests cover pass.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Publication validation still requires clean worktree and immutable proof.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Publication profiles block dirty working-tree digest alone and pass only with `clean=true` plus SHA/tree/package/archive/remote proof; tests cover block/pass.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Schemas and graph can carry content-proof fields.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Worktree isolation type/schema/normalization now preserve `tree_sha`, `working_tree_digest`, `worktree_digest`, `package_digest`, `archive_ref`, and `remote_ref`; graph isolation summary honors profile-specific proof rules.

closure_brief.user_intent: Start TASK-080/TASK-084 path to fix gateway/content-proof policy exposed by TASK-078 validation block.
implemented_changes: Allowed implementation/task-close validation to use dirty working-tree digest as pre-commit content proof.
Kept publication/push/release validation strict: clean worktree plus immutable proof required.
acceptance_evidence: codewiki_state health green for TASK-080 focus
non_goals_preserved: Did not implement the full audit engine; TASK-079 remains open.
Did not weaken publication proof requirements.
Did not auto-generate working-tree digests yet.
remaining_risks: Needs fresh validation using working-tree digest evidence before closure.
No deterministic audit helper yet computes digest automatically.

risks: No automatic working-tree digest generator exists yet; validator must compute and record digest manually until audit/gateway tooling adds deterministic helper.
TASK-079 audit engine still needed for required audit evidence plumbing.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-080 Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-080/TASK-084 gateway content-proof policy now supports dirty pre-commit working-tree digest for implementation validation while keeping publication boundaries clean and immutable.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run check:architecture, npm test, codewiki_state refresh=true include summary/roadmap/claims/session taskId=TASK-080
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
